subject:
Re: Can't run. The message("there was an error loading the
 specified boxnet model for picking) pops up
body:
Dear Dimitry

Thanks for your kind comments. I will change the GPU as soon as possible. 
Then i will install the Warp again. 
So far, i really appreciate your advise.
Have a good day.

Cheers,
Donghyun

2018년 7월 10일 화요일 오후 5시 40분 27초 UTC+9, Dimitry Tegunov 님의 말:
>
> Dear Donghyun,
>
> I'm afraid older architectures, like the 650 card, are not supported. Warp 
> will run on GPUs of the Maxwell generation or later. For GeForce cards, 
> that means series 900 and upward. A good model would be 1070 or 1080. If 
> you only intend to use it for particle picking on movie averages, a card 
> with 4 GB of memory should also be fine.
>
> Cheers,
> Dimitry
>
>
> On Monday, July 9, 2018 at 6:26:13 PM UTC+2, kukudas wrote:
>>
>> Dear Dimitry
>>
>> I'm using a NVIDIA GeForce GTX 650 as the GPU model. 
>>
>> Cheers,
>> Donghyun
>>
>> 2018년 7월 9일 월요일 오후 4시 21분 17초 UTC+9, Dimitry Tegunov 님의 말:
>>>
>>> Dear Donghyun,
>>>
>>> it looks like TensorFlow is trying to run on the CPU. I also see that 
>>> there is a single GPU with very little memory available in your system. 
>>> Could you please tell me what GPU model you're using? Please note the 
>>> hardware recommendations in the install guide 
>>> <http://www.google.com/url?q=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.warpem.com%2Fwarp%2F%3Fpage_id%3D65&sa=D&sntz=1&usg=AFQjCNGswOCmtAuALWGDAIfuA2z7F6EgNA>
>>> .
>>>
>>> Cheers,
>>> Dimitry
>>>
>>>
>>> On Friday, July 6, 2018 at 6:40:15 AM UTC+2, kukudas wrote:
>>>>
>>>>
>>>> Dear Dimitry
>>>>
>>>> First of all, Thank you for replying.
>>>> I followed your advice so that change the path of the BoxNet model 
>>>> folder as the all-Latin character. The path of the BoxNet model is as 
>>>> follows
>>>> C:\Warp\boxnet2models\BoxNet2_20180602
>>>> C:\Warp\boxnet2models\BoxNet2Mask_20180531
>>>> Even though i changed it, I can't run the Warp. But the pop-up messages 
>>>> are changed a little bit as below. 
>>>> I'm sorry to bother you, but please help me....
>>>>
>>>>
>>>> 2018년 7월 5일 목요일 오후 11시 18분 27초 UTC+9, Dimitry Tegunov 님의 말:
>>>>>
>>>>> Dear Donghyun,
>>>>>
>>>>> is it possible that you have some non-Latin characters in the path to 
>>>>> the BoxNet model folder? I just tried including a Korean character in the 
>>>>> folder name, and it appears TensorFlow can't handle it properly. I'm afraid 
>>>>> the only immediate workaround would be to make sure the paths are 
>>>>> all-Latin. I'll look into modifying the TensorFlow interface, but this 
>>>>> might take a while and there is no guarantee I will succeed.
>>>>>
>>>>> Cheers,
>>>>> Dimitry
>>>>>
>>>>> On Thursday, July 5, 2018 at 9:55:15 AM UTC+2, kukudas wrote:
>>>>>>
>>>>>> When i click the "Start pressing", The message("there was an error 
>>>>>> loading the specified boxnet model for picking) pops up. How do i overcome 
>>>>>> this problem?
>>>>>> Please help me.....
>>>>>>
>>>>>>
